questions.q: Which CLI tool is CRI-compatible, maintained by the Kubernetes community, and designed for node debugging?
questions.explanation: crictl is a CLI tool designed for CRI-compliant container runtimes and is used specifically for node debugging.

questions.q: With dockershim removed in v1.24, existing Docker-built images will no longer run on Kubernetes.
questions.explanation: False. Docker images comply with the OCI image specification, which is supported by all CRI runtimes (like containerd and CRI-O).
